## Linked issue

Refs #

- [ ] The linked issue is open and correctly scoped.
- [ ] This PR uses `Closes #N` or `Fixes #N` only if every acceptance criterion is satisfied.

## Change

## Scientific or methodological impact

## Corpus/schema compatibility

## Provenance and reproducibility

## External-reference contamination check

- [ ] No external transliteration informed canonical observation.
- [ ] New assumptions are documented.
- [ ] Tests and reproduction steps are included.

## Merge lifecycle

- [ ] After merge, referenced issues will be reviewed and either closed with evidence or updated with a status checkpoint.
- [ ] Superseded or cancelled PRs are identified and closed explicitly.
